summary: UI change-request verifications passed. Hero social hrefs correct (LinkedIn/GitHub/Tableau). Experience accordion toggles open+collapse and reveals bullets+metric. Certification cert-0 (Databricks) and cert-1 (Bloomberg) hrefs correct. Skills renders 4 side-by-side rows (Programming, Analytics, Softwares, BI / Vizz) with chips. Education M.S. period reads 'May 2026' (no 'Expected'). Regression: contact form submits with success toast, navbar smooth-scroll works (scrolled to y=2667 from 0), no console/page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Skills mono-label uses CSS text-transform: uppercase; source data 'BI / Vizz' renders as 'BI / VIZZ' visually. This is fine per design but note assertions on rendered text must be case-insensitive.
Education .mono-label also uppercases 'May 2026' visually to 'MAY 2026' - source value is correct but visual rendering is uppercase; acceptable.
seed_data_creation: One TEST contact record created via /api/contact through UI during regression check
context_for_next_testing_agent: All six UI change-requests from iteration 2 verified via Playwright against production URL (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). Experience accordion has data-testid experience-toggle-{i} with aria-expanded. Skills labels are uppercased via CSS - use text_content() or case-insensitive matching. Education period is now 'May 2026' in source (portfolio.js line 132).
